title: MCP Provenance
description: Structured source attribution for tool responses, enabling clients to provide verifiable citations.

Provenance.title: Provenance
Provenance.description: Attached to any data point in a tool response to indicate its origin.

source.description: Identifier for the source document, database, API, or system.

location.description: Where within the source the data was found.

retrieved_at.description: When this data was retrieved from the source.

version.description: Version or revision of the source document.

confidence.description: 'exact' = literal value from source; 'derived' = computed from source data; 'estimated' = approximation; 'uncertain' = low confidence.

transformation.description: If the value was derived or transformed, describe how.
examples: SUM of rows 2-15 in column B
Currency converted from EUR to USD at 1.08

ProvenanceWrapper.title: Provenance Wrapper
ProvenanceWrapper.description: Wraps a tool response with provenance metadata.

oneOf.description: Multiple provenance records when the result aggregates data from several sources.
